title: Profile Violation — c2pa.removed Action
description: Verifies that a conformant validator correctly reports a valid claim signature for a manifest that includes a c2pa.removed action, which is not a valid C2PA action type. The signature is valid; the non-conformance is detected at the profile evaluation level.

validationStatus.explanation: The claim signature is cryptographically valid. The c2pa.removed action is not a valid C2PA action and should be flagged by a profile-aware validator.
